expectations.text: Output contains exactly 3 use case sections
expectations.evidence: Three use cases: Lead Qualification Engine, Personalized Outreach Email Generator, LinkedIn Signal Monitor + Intent Trigger System

expectations.text: Each use case includes at least one specific metric â€” a number, percentage, time range, or dollar range â€” in the ROI field
expectations.evidence: UC1: '2-3 hours per day', '30-45 hours'; UC2: '3-5x higher' reply rates, '1.5-2 hours'; UC3: '5-7x higher' response rates, '24 hours'

expectations.text: Each use case contains a 'Hook:' line with an outreach-ready sentence in quotes
expectations.evidence: No 'Hook:' lines. Uses 'ROI Framing:' narrative paragraphs. No outreach-ready one-liners in quotes.

expectations.text: Use cases cover at least two different dimensions (operational efficiency, revenue/growth, customer experience) â€” not all three on the same theme
expectations.evidence: Lead qualification (ops efficiency), email generation (revenue), intent signals (timing/CX) â€” 3 distinct angles

expectations.text: Use cases reference specific details from the input (e.g., LinkedIn lead qualification, outreach emails, 15-person sales team, burnout) â€” not generic AI descriptions
expectations.evidence: References LinkedIn profiles, 15 reps, custom cold emails, Apify scraping, rep burnout

expectations.text: Output ends with a quick pitch summary section containing 3 bullets
expectations.evidence: Ends with a Summary Table and 'Recommended starting point' paragraph, not a 3-bullet pitch summary
